headlines.description: — Caleb Williams was prepared to lead a game-winning drive to beat the Cincinnati Bengals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bears outlast Bengals for wild 47-42 win on Williams' TD pass to Loveland in final minute

headlines.description: — J.J. McCarthy was hailed by teammates in a jubilant locker room after...
headlines.shortLinkText: J.J. McCarthy throws for 2 TDs and runs for a score in his return as Vikings beat Lions 27-24

events.name: Carolina Panthers at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Rico Dowdle made one big mistake on an otherwise splendid afternoon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rico Dowdle's big day and Ryan Fitzgerald's big kick give Panthers 16-13 win over Packers

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — A pick-6 on the Los Angeles Chargers' second offensive play of the game. Then Justin Herbert lost his right tackle to injury later in the first quarter followed by <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert shakes off a pick-6 as the Chargers beat skidding Titans 27-20

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — With his team watching as its lead whittled away late in the fourth quarter, Patriots coach Mike Vrabel knew he had to say something.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patriots hang on to beat Falcons 24-23 after late extra point miss by Atlanta

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Christian McCaffrey and Brian Robinson Jr. kept getting the ball and carving through the New York Giants' defense. San Francisco 49ers coach Kyle Shanahan wondered if he should mix in a pass or two before deciding against it.
headlines.shortLinkText: Christian McCaffrey and the 49ers run all over the Giants on the way to winning 34-24

headlines.description: — The Pittsburgh Steelers tuned out the noise and turned back the clock.
headlines.shortLinkText: Embattled Steelers defense forces 6 turnovers as Pittsburgh tops AFC-leading Indianapolis 27-20

headlines.description: — Bo Nix knows Sunday's win over the Houston Texans wasn't pretty.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos rally to beat Texans 18-15 with last-second field goal

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Trevor Lawrence went into Sunday's game at Las Vegas battling an illness, and then had trouble getting the Jaguars' offense going. He even threw an interception into double coverage in the end zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trevor Lawrence scores in OT and Jags' DaVon Hamilton denies Raiders' 2-point try for 30-29 win

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Jared Verse walked into a deserted room Saturday night and thought he had somehow missed the Los Angeles Rams' team meeting.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford hits Davante Adams with 2 of his 4 TD passes while the Rams rout the Saints 34-10

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — After Josh Allen spent much of the past week downplaying Buffalo’s showdown against Kansas City, the Bills quarterback revealed there was more to the rivalry than he let on.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen has 3 TDs and Bills use sturdy defense to top Mahomes and Chiefs 28-21

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold was in the type of groove a quarterback rarely experiences.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold leads Seahawks to easy 38-14 win over Commanders, who lose Jayden Daniels to arm injury
